title: product-capabilities.yaml
description: Per-product capability matrix. Records the differences between Codex and Claude that source authoring needs to know: nested skill support, plugin manifest schema reality, hooks model, config activation surfaces, runtime state boundaries, and the explicit field-level diff between `.codex-plugin/plugin.json` and `.claude-plugin/plugin.json`.

products.description: Capability blocks keyed by product. `codex`, `claude`, and `hermes` are required.

plugin_manifest_diff.description: Explicit field-level diff between `.codex-plugin/plugin.json` and `.claude-plugin/plugin.json`. Drift audit reads this to know which fields are intentionally divergent vs. drift.

shared_fields.description: Field names that both manifests carry.

codex_only_fields.description: Field names that only appear in `.codex-plugin/plugin.json`. Codex's plugin loader discovers each plugin's bundled `skills/<skill>/SKILL.md` directly and ignores the manifest `skills` array, so that array is kept as source-organisation audit metadata.

claude_only_fields.description: Field names that only appear in `.claude-plugin/plugin.json`. These ARE loaded by Claude's plugin runtime.

nested_skill_support.description: Whether the product can address skills nested under multi-level directories (Claude: yes via plugin root; Codex: yes via $CODEX_HOME-relative paths referenced from AGENTS.md / hooks).

path_pattern.description: Where the product looks for its plugin manifest, in template form (e.g. `${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/<plugin>/.claude-plugin/plugin.json`).

loaded_at_runtime.description: Whether the product's plugin loader reads this file at runtime. Both products are `true` (the kit ships a marketplace for each); Codex additionally auto-discovers bundled skills and ignores the manifest `skills` field.

schema_ref.description: Reference to the schema used to validate this manifest (`core/docs/schemas/...` or upstream URL).

config_surface.description: How hooks are registered with the product (e.g. `settings.json` block, `config.toml` managed block).

payload_shape.description: Short name for the hook payload schema (e.g. `claude-pretool-v1`, `codex-toml-managed-block`). Cross-references the schema files in `core/docs/schemas/hooks/` when those land.

supports_inline_python.description: Whether the product's hook surface supports inline Python (Claude's `.claude/hooks/*.py` pattern). Codex hooks are shell-only via TOML managed block.

config_activation.description: Ordered list of files / surfaces the product reads at session start to activate a domain. Listed top-down (most-authoritative first).

state_home_env.description: Env var the product (or this kit) consults for writable runtime state.

default_path.description: Default state home when the env var is unset, in template form.

marketplace_concept.description: Whether the product has an upstream plugin marketplace / discovery API. Claude: true. Codex is tracked false in this kit's baseline, but Codex shipped a real plugin marketplace in 2026 — the value is pending a capability-model correction (see the top NOTE in manifests/product-capabilities.yaml).
